Theaters of War

Explore the global conflict through an interactive map. Watch territorial changes unfold as you move through the war years.

1939
1942
1945

Legend

Axis Control
Allied Control
Soviet Control
Contested

Three Major Theaters

Western Europe

1940-1945

Opponents: Germany vs USA, UK, France, Free French
Key Operations: Operation Overlord (D-Day), Operation Torch (North Africa)
Major Battles: Battle of Britain, D-Day (Normandy), Battle of the Bulge

Eastern Europe

1941-1945

Opponents: Germany vs USSR
Key Operations: Operation Barbarossa, Soviet counteroffensives
Major Battles: Battle of Moscow, Stalingrad, Kursk, Leningrad Siege

Asia & Pacific

1941-1945

Opponents: Japan vs USA, UK, China, Australia
Key Operations: Island hopping campaign, carrier warfare
Major Battles: Pearl Harbor, Midway, Guadalcanal, Iwo Jima, Okinawa

Major Operations

Operation Overlord

D-Day invasion of Normandy

1944

Operation Torch

Allied invasion of North Africa

1942

Operation Husky

Invasion of Sicily

1943

Operation Barbarossa

Invasion of Soviet Union

1941

Operation Market Garden

Airborne assault in Netherlands

1944

Operation Vengeance

Mission to kill Admiral Yamamoto

1943

Sources include Antony Beevor, William L. Shirer, US National Archives, and academic historians.
